title: Golden Hashed Butter Cazuela
description: A Canadian-inspired dish featuring melted butter, tadka, and crispy potatoes. This cazuela is a great breakfast option, rich in flavor and satisfying in texture.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large cazuela over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper over the top and stir to combine.
Add the tadka spice blend and stir to coat the potatoes evenly.
Transfer the cazuela to the oven and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
Reheat in the microwave or oven until warm and crispy.
